key.name: edge
key.description: The edge where the Kanban board is anchored.

key.name: monitor-mode
key.description: Whether the board anchors to the primary monitor or the outer display edge in a multi-monitor layout.

key.name: side-size
key.description: Panel width in pixels when anchored to the left or right edge.

key.name: bar-size
key.description: Panel height in pixels when anchored to the top or bottom edge.

key.name: handle-size
key.description: Visible handle size in pixels when the board is hidden.

key.name: handle-coverage
key.description: Percentage of the screen edge used as the centered reveal target.

key.name: handle-mode
key.description: Whether the handle is visible only while hidden, always visible, or transparent.

key.name: hide-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before hiding after the pointer leaves the board.

key.name: background-mode
key.description: How the Kanban surface background is chosen.

key.name: background-color
key.description: Hex color used when background-mode is custom.

key.name: storage-mode
key.description: Whether task data is stored in the default XDG config location or a custom JSON file.

key.name: storage-path
key.description: Path to a custom tasks JSON file when storage-mode is custom.
